title: Berlin Umweltzone Sticker - Quick Summary
items: **The Berlin Umweltzone sticker matters only if you drive into the inner city.** It is a driving rule, not a public transport fare zone.
**The zone sits inside the S-Bahn Ring.** Berlin AB/ABC ticket zones are a different system, so do not use your train ticket map to judge the driving rule.
**Foreign vehicles and many rental cars still need the green sticker.** Check the windscreen and the registration number before you enter central Berlin.
**Order before the trip if you bring your own car.** Berlin's LABO page says foreign delivery can take about 7 to 14 days.
**If the sticker question is not solved, park outside and ride in.** For most visitors, that is calmer than mixing paperwork, luggage and central parking.
